mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pipe_flow_record (pipe_no, pipe_name, monitor_date, monitor_hour, flow_rate, water_pressure, anomaly_level, water_quality) VALUES
(#{item.pipeNo}, #{item.pipeName}, #{item.monitorDate}, #{item.monitorHour}, #{item.flowRate}, #{item.waterPressure}, #{item.anomalyLevel}, #{item.waterQuality})
mapper.select: SELECT pipe_no AS pipeNo, pipe_name AS pipeName, SUM(flow_rate) AS totalFlow, AVG(flow_rate) AS avgFlow, COUNT(*) AS recordCount FROM pipe_flow_record WHERE monitor_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY pipe_no, pipe_name ORDER BY totalFlow DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT anomaly_level AS anomalyLevel, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipe_flow_record WHERE monitor_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 2) AS percentage FROM pipe_flow_record WHERE monitor_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY anomaly_level ORDER BY anomaly_level

SELECT CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(monitor_date) IN (1, 7) THEN '周末' ELSE '工作日' END AS dayType, SUM(flow_rate) AS totalFlow, AVG(flow_rate) AS avgFlow, COUNT(DISTINCT monitor_date) AS dayCount FROM pipe_flow_record WHERE monitor_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY dayType ORDER BY dayType

SELECT monitor_hour AS monitorHour, AVG(flow_rate) AS avgFlow, MAX(flow_rate) AS maxFlow, MIN(flow_rate) AS minFlow FROM pipe_flow_record WHERE monitor_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY monitor_hour ORDER BY monitor_hour
SELECT monitor_hour AS monitorHour, AVG(flow_rate) AS avgFlow FROM pipe_flow_record WHERE pipe_no = #{pipeNo} GROUP BY monitor_hour ORDER BY monitor_hour
SELECT DISTINCT pipe_no FROM pipe_flow_record ORDER BY pipe_no

SELECT CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(monitor_date) IN (1, 7) THEN '周末' ELSE '工作日' END AS dayType, SUM(total_flow) AS totalFlow, AVG(avg_flow) AS avgFlow, COUNT(DISTINCT monitor_date) AS dayCount FROM daily_flow_summary WHERE monitor_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY dayType ORDER BY dayType
